name: variety-multiple-parks
description: Open-ended query should mention multiple distinct parks, not fixate on one

messages.content: What are the best national parks to visit in September?

mustInclude.pattern: (?:Yellowstone|Glacier|Zion|Grand Canyon|Acadia|Rocky Mountain|Great Smoky|Yosemite|Grand Teton|Olympic|Shenandoah|Bryce Canyon|Arches).*(?:Yellowstone|Glacier|Zion|Grand Canyon|Acadia|Rocky Mountain|Great Smoky|Yosemite|Grand Teton|Olympic|Shenandoah|Bryce Canyon|Arches)
